$comment: RubyMIK update manifest served at https://rubymik.com/version.json. Updated by scripts/release.sh on each release. P38 contract.
notes: 1.1.4 — patch: the generated Remote Access compose now reproduces your actual host port (no assumed 8080 → no 'port already allocated' on non-8080 installs) and adds no ports you aren't already publishing (WebFig 8081 is a commented hint, not a published port). The file equals your running config plus only the WireGuard lines. No migration (schema unchanged). See the changelog.
